name: nfl_team_seasonlogs_catch_rate range year_offset averages the rate window
description: catch_rate is a rate; a range year_offset reduces with AVG, not SUM.
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, (SELECT AVG(nfl_team_seasonlogs.catch_rate) FROM nfl_team_seasonlogs WHERE nfl_team_seasonlogs.nfl_team = player.current_nfl_team AND nfl_team_seasonlogs.season_year IN (2024,2025) AND nfl_team_seasonlogs.stat_key = 'QB_TOTAL') AS "nfl_team_seasonlogs_catch_rate_0", "player"."primary_position" from "player" group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
